meta.title: Kontor Business Club
meta.description: Meet. Trust. Recommend. An exclusive circle of entrepreneurs – one representative per industry.

absaetze: We bring together people who think and act entrepreneurially.

To the self-employed, managing directors and ambitious founders we offer a select circle in which personal encounters grow into lasting business relationships. For we are convinced that recommendations arise from trust, and trust arises where people know and value one another.
That is why we create the right setting for exchange among companions, for shared experiences and for a network that carries with commitment.

events.leer: There are currently no upcoming events listed.

club.text: The exclusive Kontor for personalities who seek more than the next network. We place commitment above reach, to gather a circle of mutual value.

veranstaltungen.text: Business events for professional exchange and impulses, and social events for personal connection. Complemented by distinguished entrepreneurs who open up new perspectives with inspiring talks.

miteinander.text: Our Kontor is carried by mutual appreciation. We meet one another as equals, with respect, openness and the willingness to stand up for each other, in business as well as on a human level.

items.zitat: Three introductions from the club have grown into long-term clients. A referral from here carries greater weight than any cold outreach.
items.name: Member

items.zitat: I searched for a long time for a circle in which I am not the third of my industry. At Kontor I experience what becomes possible when people see each other as allies.
items.name: Member

items.zitat: Over time, two members became genuine business partners. Relationships of this kind do not arise at a fleeting after-work event, but where people meet in person on a regular basis.
items.name: Member

items.frage: Which personalities is the membership aimed at?
items.antwort: We address entrepreneurially minded personalities from the region who act with business responsibility, innovative foresight and personal aspiration. Whether owner-managed company, established management or aspiring start-up — what matters is attitude, substance and the willingness to engage with a Kontor in which commitment counts.

items.frage: What does the principle of industry exclusivity mean in lived practice?
items.antwort: Each industry is represented in the Kontor Business Club by exactly one member. This creates a circle in which every voice represents its own discipline. Recommendations can therefore be made openly and deliberately, conversations gain depth, and the exchange turns into genuine, mutual value.

items.frage: Can I attend an event as an interested guest before I consider membership?
items.antwort: Very gladly. We expressly invite those interested to get to know the Kontor Business Club in person first, both at a business event and at a social event. Up to two visits are free of charge for you, regardless of whether you approach us on a member's recommendation or on your own initiative. We do ask, however, for a prior online registration for the respective event so that we can receive you appropriately.

items.frage: May I bring a business partner to an event, and can I send a representative if I cannot attend in person?
items.antwort: Both bringing a business partner and sending a representative are possible at our events. Per business event you may invite up to two business partners as guests. A prior online registration is likewise required for them. Should you be unable to attend a business event in person, a representative is possible. We do ask, however, that you always name the same person, so that your representative, too, remains familiar and recognisable within the Kontor.

items.frage: What dress code is customary at the gatherings?
items.antwort: For our business events, business casual applies. At our social events, smart casual is appropriate, although the choice of attire also depends on the respective occasion and setting. Should an event call for a special note, we will point this out in advance.

items.frage: How often do the members come together, and at which locations do the meetings take place?
items.antwort: The Kontor Business Club meets twice a month: once for a business event and once for a social event. Our main venue is the event spaces at the headquarters of Provinzial Versicherung. For selected social events we deliberately choose other locations, where the character of the event suggests it.

items.frage: How do business events and social events differ in content?
items.antwort:
Our business events are dedicated to entrepreneurial value. They combine inspiring talks by distinguished speakers with pitches from our members, an open discussion and Q&A round, and ample networking. This is where impulses, recommendations and lasting business connections arise.

Our social events follow a different spirit. They thrive on the suggestions, interests and proposals of our members. The occasion and setting thus emerge from the Kontor itself.

kontaktCta.titel: With whom do you spend your most valuable time?
kontaktCta.text1: We believe that the right people make the difference.
kontaktCta.text2: If you see it that way too, we look forward to your participation.

club.intro: Kontor is a fixed circle of entrepreneurs who know each other, trust each other and recommend one another. Here you learn how the club feels, why there is only one representative per industry and what we agree on.

clubleben.intro: Kontor is not just another networking date in your calendar. It is a fixed circle where people actually know each other.
absaetze: With us there is not a different face at the table every evening. The circle stays small enough for trust to grow. People who meet over months recommend differently than someone you ran into once at a trade fair.
We clearly separate business and social. Business events are about concrete referrals, projects and collaboration. Social events are about the person behind the company.
Everything takes place in person and never during your regular working hours. Your day-to-day business comes first. The club fits around it, not the other way round.

philosophie.intro: The rule sounds strict, but it is the reason Kontor works.
absaetze: If two accountants or two tradespeople sit at the same table, you get competition instead of referrals. No one sends a client to a direct rival. That is why Kontor has only one representative per industry.
It makes every referral valuable. Whoever is asked in the club is the one go-to person for their field. Complementarity instead of competition is our model.
For you that means your industry is yours as long as you are part of the club. No one else from your field joins alongside you.

charta.intro: A few simple principles hold Kontor together.
punkte: One industry, one representative. No internal competition.
Referrals are meant seriously and are honoured.
All events in person, never during regular working hours.
Representation only at business events, by a fixed person from the company.
Guests are welcome if they fit the idea behind Kontor.
We speak openly and keep what is confidential confidential.

intro.text: At Kontor there are business events for the professional side and social events for the personal one. Both always in person and outside your regular working hours.

business.text: This is about concrete referrals, projects and collaboration. Everyone presents what they are looking for and what they can offer. If you cannot attend yourself, a fixed representative from your company may come.

social.text: Relaxed, personal, no agenda. This is where you get to know the person behind the company. Friends and colleagues may join if they fit the idea behind Kontor.

kalender.text: The next events at a glance. Register through the form below.
kalender.leerHinweis: There are currently no further dates listed. The opening night is on 18 June 2026 in Münster.

anmeldung.intro: Tell us which event you are coming to and whether you are bringing someone along.

login.intro: Sign-in is reserved for members. Here you find internal dates, contacts and documents.
login.hinweis: The members area is not public. Members are admitted personally and receive their access directly from us.

vorteile.intro: A membership is more than a line on a list. It secures your spot and your industry.
punkte: Your industry is yours. No direct competition inside the club.
Real referrals from a circle that knows you.
Business events for tangible value, social events for the connection.
Dates always in person and never during regular working hours.
Representation possible at business events, by a fixed person.
Bringing guests allowed if they fit.

antrag.intro: The way into Kontor is low-threshold and transparent. You submit an application, we get to know each other, and if your industry is open, we welcome you in.

antrag.erfolgText: Your application has reached us. The board will get back to you within 7 working days.

antrag.faqTitel: Frequent questions about the admission process

items.antwort: Self-employed entrepreneurs, managing directors and innovative start-up founders. The club admits exactly one member per industry.

items.frage: How does the admission process work?
items.antwort: You submit your application with a short presentation of yourself and your company. The board reviews the application and decides within seven working days.
The monthly fee is €80 (alternatively payable quarterly, half-yearly or yearly). A one-time admission fee of €150 applies in addition.

items.frage: How long does the contract run?
items.antwort: Membership runs for an indefinite period and can be cancelled with one full month's notice to the end of the month.

items.frage: What if I cannot attend an event?
items.antwort: For business events you may send a representative. For social events personal attendance is expected; representation is not provided here.
Yes. Interested friends and colleagues are welcome before they possibly become members themselves. Please announce guests in advance to the club management.

items.frage: When do the events take place?
items.antwort: Twice a month – one business event and one social event – outside regular working hours, always in person.

beratung.intro: Questions about Kontor, or want to know whether your industry is still open? Write to us and we will get back to you soon.

formular.intro: The more concrete your message, the better we can answer you.
